evals.description: Skill triggers when user asks about project risk assessment
evals.prompt: I need to identify the biggest risks for our upcoming API migration project

evals.description: Skill triggers when user asks about dependency tracking
evals.prompt: How should I track dependencies between my team and the platform team for our Q2 launch?

evals.description: Skill triggers when user needs a status update
evals.prompt: Help me write a weekly status update for my project sponsor

evals.description: Agent can build a risk register with correct structure
evals.prompt: Create a risk register for a project that involves migrating our monolith to microservices

evals.description: Agent can map dependencies with correct attributes
evals.prompt: Map the dependencies for a project where frontend needs API specs from backend, backend needs schema from data team, and QA needs both frontend and backend to be complete

evals.description: Agent can write a proper escalation with options
evals.prompt: Our key dependency from the auth team is 2 weeks late and blocking our launch. Help me write an escalation to my VP

evals.description: Agent can create a stakeholder communication plan
evals.prompt: Create a communication plan for a project with a VP sponsor, 2 product managers, a platform team dependency, and a 6-person dev team

evals.description: Agent uses RAID log structure correctly
evals.prompt: Set up a RAID log for our new payment integration project

evals.description: Agent handles the gotcha of skipping amber status
evals.prompt: My project was green last week but now we've discovered a major blocker. Should I report it as red?

evals.description: Agent correctly advises against escalating without options
evals.prompt: I need to tell my VP that the project is going to be late. What should I say?

evals.description: Agent does not hallucinate specific project management software requirements
evals.prompt: What tools do I need to track project risks?

evals.description: Agent does not recommend waterfall-specific or methodology-locked advice
evals.prompt: How do I manage risks in my project?

evals.description: Agent correctly references the risk-management reference file for deep risk analysis
evals.prompt: I need a detailed quantitative risk analysis framework for my project with probability-weighted delay estimates

evals.description: Agent can conduct a pre-mortem exercise
evals.prompt: Run a pre-mortem for our project to launch a new checkout flow by end of Q2
